East Africa

Tanzania Travel Guide

Best for travelers who want classic northern circuit icons, high-impact wildlife, and a beach finish.

Destination guide to Tanzania

Tanzania delivers some of Africa’s most cinematic safari landscapes, from Serengeti migration scenes to the Ngorongoro Crater and Zanzibar’s coast.

Getting around

Most trips flow through Arusha, Kilimanjaro International Airport, or Dar es Salaam depending on whether the route is inland safari or coast-first.

Best time to visit

June to October is the cleanest safari season for much of the north, while January to March works well for southern Serengeti calving and beach add-ons.

Planning notes

Use this guide to compare what the country does best, how its main attractions connect, where stays and restaurants fit into the route, and which details to verify before committing to a booking.

Destination at a glance

Tanzania

  • 2 featured attractions listed
  • 1 active tour operator profiles
  • 2 accommodations nearby
  • 2 recommended restaurants

Image slot Attraction Serengeti National Park

Tanzania

Serengeti National Park

Vast migration landscapes, apex predators, and one of Africa’s strongest safari names.

★ 4.9 (1,196) From $110
Northern Tanzania

Image slot Attraction Zanzibar

Tanzania

Zanzibar

A safari-and-coast favorite built around Stone Town, beaches, and slower Indian Ocean pacing.

★ 4.7 (983) From $35
Indian Ocean coast of Tanzania
View Details

Stays that keep you close to the experience

Serengeti National Park

Serengeti Serena Safari Lodge

Image slot Stay Emerson Spice

Zanzibar

Emerson Spice

A characterful Stone Town hotel for travelers who want Zanzibar heritage and food culture before or after beach time.

★ 4.5 (356) From $180 / night
Boutique heritage hotel

Dining

Dining ideas that add flavor to the journey

Image slot Restaurant Serengeti Serena Dining

Serengeti National Park

Serengeti Serena Safari Lodge Dining

In the Serengeti, dining realism is about reliable camp meals and packed lunches because wildlife movement and distances dominate the day.

★ 4.4 (244) $$$
Safari lodge dining
View Details
Image slot Restaurant The Rock Restaurant Zanzibar

Zanzibar

The Rock Restaurant Zanzibar

The Rock is a recognizable Zanzibar dining stop for travelers who want one memorable meal between Stone Town culture and beach time.

★ 4.3 (1,028) $$$
Zanzibari seafood
